description_long: This handgun features a two-tone color scheme with a metallic silver slide and a deep red and black frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured, with a visible texturing pattern for improved handling and a dark coloration that contrasts with the upper portion. The slide is robust and angular, with a squared-off profile and a visible ejection port, as well as subtle engravings or markings. The trigger guard is rounded and spacious, providing ample room for finger placement, and the trigger itself is clearly defined. The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, blending seamlessly with the grip. The overall design is modern and tactical, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use.
description: A modern, two-tone handgun with a silver slide and red-black frame, featuring a textured ergonomic grip and a robust, angular slide. The design is tactical and visually striking, with a flat magazine base and spacious trigger guard.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the front, highlighting the barrel opening and the symmetry of the slide and frame.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile, showing the textured grip, trigger, slide markings, and the flat magazine base.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the back of the slide and grip, with the sight alignment and rear contours visible.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the slide, grip, trigger guard, and magazine base, mirroring the left but with subtle differences in markings and controls.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic comfort, with a pronounced palm swell and subtle finger grooves for secure handling. Its surface features a stippled or textured pattern, likely molded into the polymer, providing a non-slip feel. The coloration is predominantly black with red accents, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the base of the grip integrates smoothly with the magazine floorplate.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its curvature is gentle, lacking any squared-off edges or undercuts. The design is functional and unembellished, focusing on comfort and accessibility.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a non-threaded, smooth exterior profile. It is integrated into the slide, with no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The finish matches the metallic silver of the slide, and there are no distinct markings or fluting visible on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle engravings, including a small rectangular marking near the rear and a possible serial number or model designation on the side. These markings are understated and blend with the metallic finish, providing minimal visual distraction.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, aligning flush with the bottom of the grip. It has a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal, with no visible finger rest, logos, or additional texturing. The design is streamlined and functional.
